controlsCatalog.name: idempotency_key
controlsCatalog.description: Required idempotency token for request deduplication at client boundary.

controlsCatalog.name: x_correlation_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional trace/correlation identifier propagated to logs.

controlsCatalog.name: x_policy_pack_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional policy-pack identifier for request-scoped policy selection. When selected and found in catalog, configured policy fields can override engine options for this request.

controlsCatalog.name: x_tenant_policy_pack_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional explicit tenant-default policy-pack identifier. Used when no `X-Policy-Pack-Id` request override is supplied and policy packs are enabled.

controlsCatalog.name: x_tenant_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional tenant identifier used for tenant policy-pack default lookup.

controlsCatalog.name: x_correlation_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional batch correlation identifier. Successful scenario results append the scenario name to this value as `{correlation_id}:{scenario_name}`.

controlsCatalog.name: x_policy_pack_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional policy-pack identifier for request-scoped policy selection. When selected and found in catalog, configured policy fields can override scenario engine options for this request.

controlsCatalog.name: x_tenant_policy_pack_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional explicit tenant-default policy-pack identifier. Used when no `X-Policy-Pack-Id` request override is supplied and policy packs are enabled.

controlsCatalog.name: x_tenant_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional tenant identifier used for tenant policy-pack default lookup.

controlsCatalog.name: x_correlation_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional correlation identifier for async tracking and lookup.

controlsCatalog.name: x_policy_pack_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional policy-pack identifier for request-scoped policy selection. When selected and found in catalog, configured policy fields can override scenario engine options for this request.

controlsCatalog.name: x_tenant_policy_pack_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional explicit tenant-default policy-pack identifier. Used when no `X-Policy-Pack-Id` request override is supplied and policy packs are enabled.

controlsCatalog.name: x_tenant_id
controlsCatalog.description: Optional tenant identifier used for tenant policy-pack default lookup.

controlsCatalog.name: operation_id
controlsCatalog.description: Asynchronous operation identifier.

controlsCatalog.name: consumer_system
controlsCatalog.description: Consumer system requesting capability posture. Use this to resolve the correct backend-governed rebalance feature and workflow view for the caller. Send it as the canonical snake_case query parameter `consumer_system`.

controlsCatalog.name: tenant_id
controlsCatalog.description: Tenant context for policy-governed capability publication. Omit to use the default tenant posture. Send it as the canonical snake_case query parameter `tenant_id`.

controlsCatalog.name: consumer_system
controlsCatalog.description: Consumer system requesting capability posture. Use this to resolve the correct backend-governed rebalance feature and workflow view for the caller. Send it as the canonical snake_case query parameter `consumer_system`.

controlsCatalog.name: tenant_id
controlsCatalog.description: Tenant context for policy-governed capability publication. Omit to use the default tenant posture. Send it as the canonical snake_case query parameter `tenant_id`.
